run_summary.summary: One active deal update this run: Linkind came back with content revision requests for the SP6 Smart Solar Pathway Lights through socialmediacollabs.com. The brand wants Liz to add a Pattern Switch / Light Show feature demo (with app group setup), reshoot the 30-39s preset section in a darker environment so the lighting effects actually pop, and add an end CTA. The talent manager pushed back on the Light Show request but Linkind confirmed it's required. Ball is in our court. Everything else in the inbox was already captured in the previous run — Wise Block's follow-up (Apr 28), JLab Tipalti setup, Whisker ACH confirmation, Shabebe + Black Diamond outbound pitches. Those prior run items are still awaiting processing. Keeping the Wise Block urgent flag active since the Apr 30 deadline is now 2 days away.

suggestions.message: Linkind came back with three revision requests on the SP6 Solar Pathway Lights content: (1) Add the Pattern Switch + Light Show feature demo — they want a visual + voiceover showing the feature with an app group created (manager pushed back but brand said it's required); (2) Reshoot the 30-39s preset section in a darker environment so the lighting effects are actually visible — bright daylight kills the impact; (3) Add an end CTA. Once revisions are submitted, ping me and I'll move the card forward.

Apr 30 deadline is 2 days away and Iris has followed up multiple times with no reply. If there's any interest in the Botanical Series collab, a rate quote needs to go out today. If not, a quick 'not the right fit right now' keeps the door open with Make Wonder INC for future opportunities.

deals.next_action: Make revisions per Linkind's feedback — add Pattern Switch/Light Show demo, reshoot 30-39s in darker setting, add end CTA
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Linkind sent content revision requests via socialmediacollabs.com: (1) Missing Pattern Switch / Light Show feature demo — needs visual + voiceover with app group setup and dynamic color/animation effects, lens in correct position; (2) Reshoot 30-39s preset section in darker environment — lighting effects not visible in bright conditions, close-up shows only 1-2 lights not full setup; (3) Low-value 20-24s segment (tab switching) needs visual adjustment to match voiceover; (4) Add end CTA. Manager pushed back on item 1 but Linkind confirmed it is required.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Linkind requested content revisions — add Light Show/Pattern Switch demo, darker reshoots for 30-39s section, and end CTA
